title: Diasperus desmocarpus
taxonomy: Diasperus desmocarpus is classified within the family Dioscoreaceae, commonly known as the yam family. This genus is native to tropical regions and belongs to the order Dioscoreales. Diasperus desmocarpus is a type of yam and is closely related to other species in the Dioscoreaceae family. The classification of this plant is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic similarity to other Dioscoreaceae species. Diasperus desmocarpus is considered a member of the monocotyledonous flowering plants.

preparations: Diasperus desmocarpus herbal preparations typically involve the use of the plant's leaves and roots.
